title: Lesson 50 — The Model Example

words.definition: to be a typical example of; to illustrate by example
words.example: The old bridge exemplifies the engineering of its era.

words.definition: to be a perfect example of a quality or type
to represent or express an idea or quality in tangible form
words.example: The statue embodies the city's spirit of resilience.

words.definition: to represent an abstract quality as a person; to be a perfect example of
to be a representative or characteristic example of
words.example: The dish typifies the region's simple, hearty cooking.

words.definition: a distinctive feature or quality serving as a mark of excellence or identity
words.example: Careful plotting is the hallmark of her novels.

words.definition: serving as a symbol or representative example of something
words.example: The closed factory became emblematic of the town's decline.

words.definition: a person or thing regarded as a perfect example of a quality
words.example: She was held up as a paragon of patience.

words.definition: a person or thing serving as a typical or worthy example; a model
words.example: The building is an exemplar of postwar design.

words.definition: the top or highest point of something; the culmination
words.example: The award marked the apex of her career.

words.definition: the time at which something is most powerful or successful
words.example: The empire reached its zenith in the third century.

words.definition: the lowest or most unsuccessful point of a situation
words.example: That defeat was the nadir of an otherwise strong season.

story: Every coach uses one player to [[exemplify|exemplify]] the whole program's values, and for a decade that player was Marisol. She seemed to [[epitomize|epitomize]] everything the team wanted to be, to [[embody|embody]] its discipline, to [[personify|personify]] its patience under pressure. Sportswriters said her game-day routine came to [[typify|typify]] the entire league, and her calm free throws became a [[hallmark|hallmark]] of the franchise, almost [[emblematic|emblematic]] of the city itself. Younger athletes treated her as a [[paragon|paragon]], the clear [[exemplar|exemplar]] of what hard work could build. Her career had one true [[apex|apex]], a [[zenith|zenith]] season no one has matched since — and one bruising rookie year, still remembered as its [[nadir|nadir]], that she says taught her everything.
